allow: Bash(PYTHONPATH=src python -c "from app.main import app; print\('App loaded OK'\)")
Bash(./venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0,'src'\); from app.main import app; print\('App loaded OK'\)")
Bash(PYTHONPATH=src venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from app.routers.backtest import router; print\('Router OK'\)")
